category_sources: current_curation.category_path already places the project under language-runtime.
source_facts.description says ATS2/Postiats is a programming language with formal specification features.
display_name_sources: The official ATS download page describes the current implementation as ATS/Postiats and also refers to it as ATS2.
source_facts.name supplies the package id ats2-postiats.
docs_sources: The SourceForge ATS2 wiki states the current wiki moved to the GitHub ATS-Postiats wiki.
The official ATS site has a DOCUMENT section for language documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the ATS language site maintained by Hongwei Xi.
repo_sources: The official ATS download page gives the SourceForge git clone command for ATS-Postiats: git.code.sf.net/p/ats2-lang/code.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repository lookup was required.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions programming language and formal specification features.
source_facts.executables lists compiler/tool commands such as patscc and patsopt.
